blended.narrative: Crested Butte is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,877 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 42".
